content.en:
After the auction was completed, Ye Tian paid the Super Dimensional Dao Coins, obtained this medium Super Dimensional Dao Soldier Refining Diagram, and put it away.

Next, more treasures were auctioned.

It seems that there are many precious things, but in fact, they are placed in the territory of 5000, and they are easy to buy.

It's just that in the ordinary second realm, it is difficult to leave the territory of the six thousand, and it is naturally extremely difficult to enter the territory of the five thousand to buy treasures.

It can be said that without the power of the third realm as the background, there is almost no way to leave the territory of the Six Thousand.

Even forces such as the Liudu Boundary Mountain and the Garan Chamber of Commerce need to pay a great price if they want to open a permanent passage out of the Six Thousand Territory, and almost always open it once in a long time.

Therefore, even if it is a treasure that is very common in the territory of the fifth thousand, it is an extremely rare treasure in the territory of the sixth thousand.

Afterwards.

There are also many treasures that assist in comprehending the extradimensional rules, which are many times better than the original mysterious fragments, and even help to comprehend the second realm of thousands of extradimensional rules.

But it didn't help Ye Tian much, his extra-dimensional rule realm was too high, and these ordinary extra-dimensional rule auxiliaries naturally didn't work for him.

However, he also pretended to bid for it, which was a normal performance, otherwise it would be strange to show that he had no interest in these treasures at all!

After a long time, this event was coming to an end.

At this time, the real treasure was brought out.

The Haifeng Realm Lord took out an auction item and said, "The next auction is the treasure that will help the second realm to open up the transcendent realm in the body-the Mist Realm Fruit, once you use the Mist Realm Fruit to open up the extradimensional realm, you can probably increase the success rate by five percent!"

A Misty Realm Fruit that increases the success rate by 5%!

A few second realms showed interest, but most of them were not interested.

The reason why most of the second realms are not interested is because they know that they have no hope of breaking through to the third realm, and many of the extradimensional realms of the second realm have more or less caused the extradimensional realms to be flawed or damaged, and they are almost impossible to repair.

There are also some second realms with shallow foundations, no resources to back, and after cultivating for endless years, they have long given up becoming the third realm.

So.

Where would they dare to attack the Third Realm, naturally they didn't care about the Misty Realm Fruit.

There are only a few second realms that think they have potential, and only those who dream of achieving the third realm.

For those second realm extradimensional realms that are expected to achieve the third realm, even if it is a treasure that can only increase the success rate by one percent, they must fight for it, one more treasure of this kind of treasure, one more hope!

Maybe after accumulating countless years, they will have gathered enough auxiliary things to make their own breakthrough chance reach more than seventy or eighty percent, then they will dare to attack the third realm.

And so.

A small number of second realms began to compete for this Mist Realm Fruit, but Ye Tian did not participate, he did not look down on the Mist Realm Fruit at all.

Just five percent, useful?

After some bidding, this Mist Realm Fruit was auctioned off by a second-stage extradimensional realm.

This Mist Realm Fruit is also the most precious thing in this Liudu Grand Event, and there are no other treasures in the future.

However, the Haifeng Realm Lord did not announce the end of the Six Capitals Grand Meeting, but announced an important matter.

"Ladies and gentlemen, on behalf of the Liudu Boundary Mountain, I would like to announce an important matter here, and it is also a task. A battered third realm in the 5000 Territory has broken into the 6000 Territory or other nearby territories, if anyone finds or provides clues, the Yandu Heavenly Pavilion behind our Liudu Realm Mountain will give important rewards, whether it is the Eternal Essence, the Medium Extradimensional Dao Soldier, or the treasures that can improve the extradimensional rules, some will be given, and you can even leave the 6000 Territory to obtain the permanent residence of the 50000 Territory and the qualification to join some powerful forces. "

Looking for a battered third realm?

What are you kidding, even if it is a heavily damaged third realm, a wisp of power can kill them in seconds!

How dare they, if they really find out, they will definitely not be able to escape.

"Haifeng Realm Lord, isn't this mission asking us to find death?" a second realm shook his head, obviously unwilling to look for it.

The Haifeng Realm Lord smiled slightly: "Everyone, don't worry, the Transcendent Dimensional Realm in that Third Realm's body has been completely destroyed, and even the Transcendent Dimensional Dao Species has been almost destroyed, and it is difficult to repair. Nowadays, the other party almost does not dare to use the power of the third realm, and they may not even be able to exert the strength of the second realm. And once the other party is discovered, he doesn't dare to make a move, he will only flee, so he doesn't have to worry about being killed by that third realm. "[]

Even if the Haifeng Realm Lord said so, these second realms still didn't dare, after all, when it came to the third realm, it was really too dangerous.

The point is that they don't understand anything, and in case it is a struggle between two powerful forces, participating in it is undoubtedly looking for death.

"'Sea Peak Realm Lord, what is the origin of that third realm, and what kind of backing does it have, why didn't Yandu Heavenly Pavilion send a large number of second and third realms to find it himself, but instead let us assist in finding it?"

The other second realms also looked at it curiously, waiting for the answer from the Sea Peak Realm Lord.

The Haifeng Realm Lord didn't panic, and said truthfully: "Everyone, the other party has no background, the reason why Yandu Heavenly Pavilion doesn't send the second realm or the third realm to find it is because of a regulation that the extradimensional forces of the Five Thousand Territory are not allowed to send a large number of Super Dimensional Realms into the Six Thousand Territory, if everyone does this, it will undoubtedly disrupt the balance." Even the two Second Realms who fought in the Seven Thousand and One Territory were punished afterwards. "

"Ladies and gentlemen, now I will give you the image, breath and general situation of this third realm, and if there are any clues, please let me know. "

Let's talk about it, the Sea Peak Realm Lord sent these materials to these Second Realm Extradimensional Realms. (yes)

Ye Tian naturally also received specific information.

"Qingya Realm Lord, the early stage of the third realm, the six-point realm of the superdimensional rules!"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

The opponent's extra-dimensional rules are not weak, and many times when the second realm hits the third realm, it is very good that the extra-dimensional rules can reach the three-point realm, and after breaking through the third realm by luck, the super-dimensional rules cannot be improved quickly.

And this Elegant Realm Lord, the extra-dimensional rules can reach the six-point realm, which is not low!

As for why Yandu Heavenly Pavilion wanted to hunt down and kill this Qingya Realm Lord, the Haifeng Realm Lord didn't say it, maybe even the Haifeng Realm Lord didn't know about Cang.

And.

Yandu Heavenly Pavilion definitely sent a small number of second realms or individual third realms to enter here, but they would not appear on the bright side, and they were also investigating in secret.

When it comes to the existence of the third realm, this is naturally not a trivial matter, and it is estimated that it will not be long before it spreads throughout the entire Six Thousand Territory and some surrounding territories.
